metadata.name: Custom evaluators sample
metadata.description: Demonstrates referencing a custom LLM-judge evaluator alongside a built-in one. The custom evaluator (professional_tone) is resolved at runtime from <project_root>/custom-evaluators/professional_tone/.

items.prompt: How do I submit an expense report?
items.expected_response: Use the Expense portal under MyHR.

items.prompt: What is our company's PTO carryover policy?
items.expected_response: Employees can carry over up to 5 unused PTO days into the next calendar year.
items.context: PTO carryover policy: Employees may carry over a maximum of 5 unused vacation days to the following calendar year. Any unused days beyond this cap are forfeited on January 1.
